title: 8th Place Winner - IMPHNEN Kolosalai Hackathon 2025
description: Developed Bekal Bangsa, an end-to-end AI and IoT powered ecosystem for the MBG program using Next.js and FastAPI, designed to connect UMKM vendors with kitchens to streamline operations and ensure food quality through Claude 4.5 integration.

title: 1st Place - Physics National Science Olympiad 2021
description: Achieved 1st place at the city level in the National Science Olympiad for Physics in Jakarta Pusat.

title: 3rd Place - Physics Competition Sketsa 2021
description: Secured 3rd place in the regional Physics Competition.
